nasb.text: If there is a man who takes his brother’s wife, it is abhorrent; he has uncovered his brother’s nakedness. They will be childless.

esv.text: If a man takes his brother’s wife, it is impurity. He has uncovered his brother’s nakedness; they shall be childless.

cnv.text: 如果有人娶了兄弟的妻子為妻，這是污穢的事，揭露了自己兄弟的下體；這樣作的人必無子女。

ccb.text: 如果有人娶兄嫂或弟媳，这是污秽行为，羞辱了自己的兄弟。二人必无儿无女。
